tool_results.content:
import threading

counter = Counter()
threads = [threading.Thread(target=counter.increment) for _ in range(1000)]
for t in threads:
    t.start()
for t in threads:
    t.join()
assert counter.value == 1000, f"Expected 1000, got {counter.value}"

import threading

counter = Counter()
threads = [threading.Thread(target=counter.increment) for _ in range(1000)]
for t in threads:
    t.start()
for t in threads:
    t.join()
assert counter.value == 1000, f"Expected 1000, got {counter.value}"
